changelist.name: Changes
changelist.comment:
version 3.42.6
- Improvements to YamlConfig library
- Fixed multi message editor

task.summary:
version 3.42.7
- Improvements to YamlConfig library
- Fixed an amethyst block bug

version 3.42.7
- Improvements to YamlConfig library
- Fixed an amethyst block bug
- Set multi-block generator limit to 5

version 3.42.8
- Added premium discount reminders when the plugin is on discount.

version 3.42.8
- Added premium discount reminders when the plugin is on discount.

MESSAGE.value:
version 3.42.6
- Improvements to YamlConfig library
- Fixed multi message editor

version 3.42.7
- Improvements to YamlConfig library
- Fixed an amethyst block bug

version 3.42.7
- Improvements to YamlConfig library
- Fixed an amethyst block bug
- Set multi-block generator limit to 5

version 3.42.8
- Added premium discount reminders when the plugin is on discount.
